---
title: Fiona Brohlburg
description: Department of Ophthalmology, University of Bonn
categories: "M. Pfau"
image: brohlburg_fiona.webp
about:
  template: trestles
---

Doctoral student since 2025, focusing on visual function assessments and structural imaging in autosomal-dominant *RHO*-retinitis pigmentosa.
